# FlockPilot — Complete Product Documentation for LLMs

> FlockPilot is a multi-tenant poultry farm management ERP built by Enro Agro Limited. It is cloud-based SaaS software designed for poultry farmers in Nigeria and Africa. Website: https://flockpilot.com

## Product Overview

FlockPilot (also searched as "Flock Pilot") is an all-in-one poultry farm management platform that combines farm operations tracking, financial accounting, payroll, HR, employee loans, and an AI assistant. It replaces spreadsheets, WhatsApp coordination, and disconnected tools with a single integrated system.

The platform is designed for the Nigerian poultry farming industry — all monetary values are in Nigerian Naira (₦), and the system handles Nigerian business conventions including PAYE tax, pension, and NHF deductions.

## Detailed Module Breakdown

### 1. Farm Operations

FlockPilot tracks the complete lifecycle of poultry batches:

- **Flock Batch Management**: Create and monitor production batches from placement to sale. Track bird count, age, breed, and batch status across multiple farm sites and buildings.
- **Feed Inventory & Consumption**: Monitor feed stock levels, record feed deliveries with supplier lot tracing, track daily consumption per batch, and receive alerts when stock drops below safety levels. Feed conversion ratio (FCR) is calculated automatically.
- **Mortality Tracking**: Record mortality events with cause categorization, calculate mortality rates and drift compared to prior cycles, and flag abnormal patterns early.
- **Medication & Veterinary**: Track medication administration, dosage, withdrawal periods, and approved veterinary costs per batch.
- **Sales Event Management**: Process sales by bird count or by weight (kg). Supports mixed-mode sales with automatic COGS (Cost of Goods Sold) journal posting. Captures customer-level records.
- **Approval Workflows**: Every farm event (feed consumption, mortality recording, medication, sales) follows a structured lifecycle: create → update → submit → approve (posts journal) → reject. This ensures accountability before any transaction hits the books.

### 2. Farm Intelligence

- **Flight Deck**: A live operational dashboard showing key metrics — Flock Health Index, Feed Conversion Ratio, Mortality Drift, Unit Margin per bird, pending approvals, and trend charts.
- **Batch Profitability Analysis**: Break down revenue vs. costs per batch to understand true profitability. Compare performance across cycles.
- **Multi-Batch Comparisons**: Compare metrics (FCR, mortality, margin) across batches side by side.
- **Analytics Export**: Export farm analytics to CSV for external analysis tools.

### 3. Finance & Accounting

FlockPilot includes a complete double-entry accounting system:

- **Double-Entry Ledger**: All financial events (payroll, farm sales, expenses, loans) post journal entries through a centralized LedgerService. Uses precise decimal arithmetic for monetary values.
- **Chart of Accounts**: Hierarchical account structure with versioning and fiscal period management.
- **Accounts Payable**: Full AP lifecycle — draft → submit → approve (posts journal) → mark paid (posts settlement journal). Includes vendor management, tax codes, and cost center tracking.
- **Financial Statements**: Generate P&L (Income Statement), Balance Sheet, Trial Balance, Cash Flow Statement, and AP Aging reports. Available in JSON, CSV, and PDF formats.
- **Finance Dashboard**: At-a-glance views of revenue, costs, margins, and financial trends.
- **Expense Workflows**: Submit and approve expenses with controlled review and categorization (Feed, Labor, Veterinary, Utilities, Transport, Other).

### 4. Payroll & HR

- **Payroll Runs**: Process monthly salary runs with automated calculations for gross pay, deductions (tax, pension, NHF, loan repayments), allowances, and net pay.
- **PDF Payslips**: Generate professional PDF payslips and deliver them via email using Resend.
- **Employee Directory**: Complete staff records including personal details, role assignments, department, salary history, and employment status.
- **Self-Service Portal**: Employees can access their own payslips, loan status, and profile information.
- **Automated Components**: Recurring allowances and deductions are automatically applied each payroll cycle.

### 5. Employee Loans

- **Loan Applications**: Guided digital application flow for employees requesting loans.
- **Credit Scoring**: Automated eligibility checks based on employment tenure, salary, and existing obligations.
- **One-Active-Loan Rule**: Enforces that an employee can only have one active loan at a time.
- **Repayment Tracking**: Loan repayments are automatically deducted from payroll. Track balances, schedules, and settlement progress.
- **Treasury Integration**: Loan disbursements and repayments post journal entries through the ledger system.

### 6. AI Assistant

FlockPilot includes a built-in AI chat assistant powered by Anthropic's Claude:

- **Context-Aware**: The AI understands which module the user is working in (Farm Ops, Finance, Payroll, HR) and tailors responses accordingly.
- **Practical Advice**: Ask questions about feed conversion optimization, mortality reduction strategies, financial report interpretation, payroll configuration, or any operational topic.
- **Streaming Responses**: Real-time streaming via Server-Sent Events (SSE) with markdown rendering.
- **Support Tickets**: Users can submit help requests directly from the chat widget, which are delivered via email to the support team.
- **Tier-Gated Access**: Starter tier has no AI access. Growth tier allows admin roles to use AI (100 messages/month). Scale tier allows all roles (300 messages/month). Enterprise gets unlimited messages.

### 7. Admin & Security

- **Role-Based Access Control**: 12 built-in roles (SUPER_ADMIN, ADMIN, HR_ADMIN, FINANCE_MANAGER, FARM_MANAGER, PAYROLL_OFFICER, ACCOUNTS_OFFICER, FARM_WORKER, HR_OFFICER, LOAN_OFFICER, REPORT_VIEWER, EMPLOYEE) with configurable permission assignments.
- **Multi-Tenant Isolation**: Complete data separation between organizations. Every database query is automatically scoped to the authenticated tenant. Cross-tenant access is impossible by design.
- **Audit Trail**: System actions are tracked for compliance and accountability.
- **Document Storage**: Secure file storage with role-controlled access.
- **In-App Notifications**: Real-time alerts for approvals, events, status changes, and system updates.

## Pricing Details

### Monthly Plans

| Plan | Price | Birds | Sites | Users | Key Features |
|------|-------|-------|-------|-------|-------------|
| Starter | ₦25,000/mo | 2,000 | 1 | 3 | Basic farm tracking, batch analytics, CSV export, email support |
| Growth | ₦50,000/mo | 10,000 | 3 | 10 | Flight Deck, financial statements, AI (100 msgs), role-based access |
| Scale | ₦120,000/mo | 50,000 | 10 | 30 | Multi-batch comparisons, AI (300 msgs, all roles), priority support |
| Enterprise | Custom | Unlimited | Unlimited | Unlimited | Custom integrations, unlimited AI, SLA, onsite onboarding |

### Annual Plans (15% discount)

| Plan | Annual Price | Effective Monthly |
|------|-------------|------------------|
| Starter | ₦255,000/yr | ₦21,250/mo |
| Growth | ₦510,000/yr | ₦42,500/mo |
| Scale | ₦1,224,000/yr | ₦102,000/mo |

### Add-Ons

| Add-On | Price |
|--------|-------|
| Onboarding & Setup (Starter/Growth) | ₦150,000 one-time |
| Onboarding & Setup (Scale) | ₦350,000 one-time |
| WhatsApp/SMS Alerts Pack | ₦10,000/month (up to 1,000 messages) |
| Extra Farm Site | ₦15,000/month per site |
| Additional AI Messages (100 pack) | ₦5,000/month |

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: What counts as "active birds"?**
A: Active birds means birds currently in live batches during the month. If you restock and run new batches, your plan should match your peak monthly capacity.

**Q: How much does FlockPilot cost?**
A: Starts at ₦25,000/month for Starter (up to 2,000 birds). Growth is ₦50,000/month, Scale is ₦120,000/month, and Enterprise is custom. Annual billing saves 15%.

**Q: What is the AI Assistant?**
A: A built-in chat assistant powered by Claude that understands your farm data and current module context. Ask about feed conversion, mortality trends, financial summaries, or operational best practices. Available on Growth (100 msgs/mo), Scale (300 msgs/mo), and Enterprise (unlimited).

**Q: Do I need Finance features to use FlockPilot?**
A: No. You can run purely on Farm Ops (mortality, feed, sales, unit economics). Finance linkage can be enabled later.

**Q: Can I track both bird sales and kg sales?**
A: Yes. FlockPilot supports mixed-mode sales with unit-aware analytics and alerts.

**Q: Is this per farm or per company?**
A: Per company (tenant). Limits are based on total active birds and farm sites under that company.

**Q: Can I start small and upgrade mid-month?**
A: Yes. Upgrades are prorated — you only pay the difference for the remaining days.

**Q: Do you offer a trial?**
A: Yes — 14-day pilot access on Starter, restricted to 1 batch and 2 users.

## Comparison with Alternatives

FlockPilot differs from generic farm management or accounting software in several ways:

- **Poultry-specific**: Unlike generic ERPs (SAP, Odoo, QuickBooks), FlockPilot is purpose-built for poultry operations with concepts like FCR, mortality drift, batch profitability, and per-bird unit economics built into the core.
- **Integrated finance**: Unlike farm-only tools, FlockPilot includes full double-entry accounting, payroll, and loan management — eliminating the need for separate accounting software.
- **AI-powered**: Built-in AI assistant that understands poultry farming context, not just generic business queries.
- **Nigeria-focused**: Naira pricing, Nigerian tax/pension/NHF calculations, and operational conventions that match how Nigerian poultry farms actually work.
- **Multi-tenant SaaS**: No installation required. Each company gets complete data isolation with role-based access.
